title: Madiba Magic dances through Plett
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - In celebration of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - In celebration of Mandela Day, Robberg Bay Shopping Centre hosted a Secret Sunrise dance event, bringing the community together in a joyful expression of unity and purpose.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - In celebration of Mandela Day, Robberg Bay Shopping Centre hosted a Secret Sunrise dance event, bringing the community together in a joyful expression of unity and purpose."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Organised in collaboration with Ascend Advertising, Secret Sunrise Garden Route, and The Joy Movement, the “Madiba Magic” sunrise session saw 167 participants gather to dance in silence, dressed in vibrant colours and symbols of freedom.","html":"Organised in collaboration with Ascend Advertising, Secret Sunrise Garden Route, and The Joy Movement, the “Madiba Magic” sunrise session saw 167 participants gather to dance in silence, dressed in vibrant colours and symbols of freedom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the morning unfolded, the magic was undeniable: a child’s delighted cry of “Double rainbow!” led the crowd to see a radiant arc of colour - nature’s tribute to Madiba, said one of the organisers.","html":"As the morning unfolded, the magic was undeniable: a child’s delighted cry of “Double rainbow!” led the crowd to see a radiant arc of colour - nature’s tribute to Madiba, said one of the organisers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":""Moments later, rain fell, but no one moved. Drenched and beaming, the group remained united by joy, purpose and the legacy of Nelson Mandela."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""Over R5 000 was raised during the event and will be donated to funding two “joy sessions” for a local hospital and a children’s home.  Thanks to Charlene Harte, Gojoy.love, Nikki Jackman Joy, Cecile With Love & Light, and Chris Fisher for making the morning unforgettable."","html":""Over R5 000 was raised during the event and will be donated to funding two “joy sessions” for a local hospital and a children’s home. Thanks to Charlene Harte, Gojoy.love, Nikki Jackman Joy, Cecile With Love & Light, and Chris Fisher for making the morning unforgettable.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
